question: Should we release the redesigned onboarding flow to 100% of users this Friday?
context: A campaign starts Friday, but a staged rollout is available.
constraints: Do not misrepresent availability in the campaign

evidence.title: Beta activation
evidence.content: Activation improved 8.2% among 212 invited beta users.

evidence.title: Android stability
evidence.content: Crash-free sessions fell from 99.4% to 97.8%; the cause is unknown.

evidence.title: Coverage
evidence.content: No engineer is scheduled for weekend support.

evidence.title: Rollback drills
evidence.content: The last three rollback drills took 14, 18, and 22 minutes.

question: Should the team migrate all customer analytics to the new vendor this quarter?
context: The current contract renews in six weeks and dual-writing is possible.
constraints: Migration work is capped at two engineers

evidence.title: Pilot cost
evidence.content: The pilot's monthly event cost was 31% lower.

evidence.title: Export gap
evidence.content: The new vendor does not yet support one enterprise export format used by 7 customers.

evidence.title: Dual-write check
evidence.content: A two-week dual-write test showed a 0.6% event-count mismatch.

question: Should every production change require synchronous approval from the incident commander for the next month?
context: Two recent incidents followed hurried changes, and the team wants a temporary safeguard.

evidence.title: Incident review
evidence.content: Two of the last five incidents followed changes that skipped the normal review checklist.

evidence.title: Approval latency
evidence.content: Median commander response during business hours is 19 minutes; after-hours data is unavailable.

evidence.title: Change volume
evidence.content: The service averages 26 production changes per week.
